title: ferray-core: no unravel_index / ravel_multi_index
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.unravel_index(flat_index, shape) and np.ravel_multi_index(multi_index, shape) convert between flat and multi-dimensional indices. These are in numpy._core.multiarray. ferray-core uses flat indexing internally (flat_index method) but doesn't expose the index conversion utilities. These are needed for: argmin/argmax returning multi-dim positions, custom iteration patterns, sparse array construction, and fixing the O(n) flat_index issue (#350).
